title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. esserianum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. esserianum, also known as the Jurassic Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. esserianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties.
